home.about.lead: with over 270 active companies across Catalonia’s main ports, organised in a structured digital directory and continuously growing.
home.about.p1: The platform classifies nautical services so you can find providers quickly, clearly and precisely.
home.about.p2: From technical maintenance and repairs to charter, marinas and specialised activities, it enables a direct connection between nautical professionals and users who need reliable solutions around their port.
home.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
home.faq.a1: NautiCards was created to solve how difficult it can be to find marine suppliers and workshops for boat owners and users. It is an open directory that groups companies by port and service, making it easier to search and access their website and contact details directly.
home.faq.q2: How do I find a company?
home.faq.a2: Go to the Search section and filter by port or by service type. The directory is designed to be useful both for boats moored in a port and for sailors in transit, and it also includes providers located outside port areas.
home.faq.q3: Is there any cost to appear on NautiCards?
home.faq.a3: NautiCards is a public directory whose mission is to provide as much information as possible to users. Listing companies and professionals is completely free, including profile management and image uploads.
home.faq.q4: How can I add my business?
home.faq.a4: To add your business, simply complete the registration form. With the company name and website, an initial profile is automatically created based on publicly available information. We recommend completing all fields and adding images to improve presentation and visibility.
search.empty: Select a port, a service, or type at least 3 characters to start searching.

contact.subtitle: Add your business to the directory, correct a listing or contact us for support or collaborations.
contact.cards.add.title: Add business
contact.cards.add.desc: Request to include your company in the directory and improve your visibility within the nautical sector.
contact.cards.fix.title: Correct a listing
contact.cards.fix.desc: If you notice incomplete or incorrect information, send us the correction and we will review it.
contact.cards.support.title: Support
contact.cards.support.desc: You can also contact us for collaborations, general questions or platform improvements.
contact.sidebar.title: Write to us with context
contact.sidebar.desc: To help you better, include the key information about your company or the listing you want to correct in your message.
contact.sidebar.add.title: If you want to add a business
contact.sidebar.add.desc: Include business name, location, services, website, phone number and any relevant details.
contact.sidebar.fix.title: If you want to correct a listing
contact.sidebar.fix.desc: Paste the listing URL or the company name and specify exactly which data should be changed.
contact.sidebar.time.title: Review time
contact.sidebar.time.desc: We will review your request as soon as possible. The more complete it is, the better.
contact.form.title: Contact form
contact.form.desc: Use this form to add a business, correct information or request support.
contact.message.placeholder: Example: company name, port or area, services, website, phone number and any information you want to add or correct.
contact.before.title: Before sending
contact.before.p1: This page is intended for nautical businesses, listing corrections and general inquiries.
contact.before.p2: If you want us to review a specific company, write its name and, if possible, include the listing URL or its location.
contact.before.p3: The more information you send in the message, the fewer follow-ups will be needed.
legal.notice.metaDescription: Legal notice of NautiCards. Information about the site owner, terms of use, and website liability.
legal.notice.subtitle: This page contains the general information of the website owner, as well as the terms of use of the directory and the applicable limitations of liability.
legal.notice.section1.title: 1. Identification details
legal.notice.section2.title: 2. Purpose of the website
legal.notice.section2.p1: NautiCards is an informational directory focused on the nautical sector, with the purpose of showing companies, services, ports, and other relevant information for users and professionals.
legal.notice.section2.p2: The purpose of the site is to make it easier to find businesses and services in the sector, as well as to provide a contact channel to request listings, corrections, or profile updates.
legal.notice.section3.title: 3. Terms of use
legal.notice.section3.p1: Accessing and using this website grants the status of user and implies acceptance of these terms from the moment the site is browsed.
legal.notice.section3.p2: The user agrees to use the site lawfully and appropriately, and not to carry out actions that may damage, disable, overload, or impair the website, its content, or its services.
legal.notice.section3.p3: It is prohibited to use the contents of the site for unlawful, fraudulent purposes or in a way contrary to good faith and public order.
legal.notice.section4.title: 4. Intellectual and industrial property
legal.notice.section4.p1: All content on this website, including texts, designs, structure, logos, images, code, and graphic elements, is protected by intellectual and industrial property regulations, unless expressly stated otherwise.
legal.notice.section4.p2: The reproduction, distribution, transformation, or public communication of the contents is not allowed without prior express authorization from the corresponding owner.
legal.notice.section5.title: 5. Liability for content
legal.notice.section5.p1: The owner seeks to ensure that the published information is useful, accurate, and reasonably up to date. Even so, the total absence of errors, the absolute accuracy of all data, and the permanent updating of the information shown cannot be guaranteed.
legal.notice.section5.p2: Company, port, or service profiles may contain information from public sources, collaborations, or third-party requests, so some data may change over time.
legal.notice.section5.p3: If you detect an error or outdated information, you can report it through the contact page for review.
legal.notice.section6.title: 6. External links
legal.notice.section6.p1: This site may include links to third-party websites for informational or reference purposes. The owner is not responsible for the content, availability, policies, or practices of such external sites.
legal.notice.section7.title: 7. Changes
legal.notice.section7.p1: The owner reserves the right to modify the website content, as well as this legal notice, at any time and without prior notice, in order to adapt it to regulatory, technical, or operational changes.
legal.notice.section8.title: 8. Applicable law and jurisdiction
legal.notice.section8.p1: The relationship between the website owner and the user shall be governed by current Spanish law. In the event of conflict or dispute, both parties shall submit to the courts and tribunals that apply according to law.
legal.privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy of NautiCards. Information about personal data processing, purposes, legal basis, and user rights.
legal.privacy.subtitle: This page explains how personal data collected through forms or communications submitted through this website is processed.
legal.privacy.section1.title: 1. Data controller
legal.privacy.section2.title: 2. Data collected
legal.privacy.section2.p1: Through the website forms or contact channels, identifying and contact data may be collected, such as:
legal.privacy.section2.li3: Phone number, if provided by the user
legal.privacy.section2.li4: Information voluntarily included in the message
legal.privacy.section2.p2: Specially sensitive data will not be requested unless it is strictly necessary and there is an appropriate legal basis for doing so.
legal.privacy.section3.title: 3. Purpose of the processing
legal.privacy.section3.p1: Personal data may be processed for the following purposes:
legal.privacy.section3.li2: To manage listing requests, modifications, or corrections
legal.privacy.section3.li3: To handle incidents or communications related to the website
legal.privacy.section3.li4: To carry out basic follow-up of received requests
legal.privacy.section4.title: 4. Legal basis
legal.privacy.section4.p1: The legal basis for processing the data is, depending on the case, the user's consent when submitting the form or the application of pre-contractual measures at the request of the data subject.
legal.privacy.section4.p2: Where there is a contractual relationship or a legal obligation, the processing may also rely on those legal bases.
legal.privacy.section5.title: 5. Data retention
legal.privacy.section5.p1: Data will be kept for the time necessary to handle the user's request and, afterwards, for the legal periods that may be required or appropriate to address possible liabilities.
legal.privacy.section6.title: 6. Recipients
legal.privacy.section6.p1: As a general rule, data will not be disclosed to third parties unless there is a legal obligation or it is necessary for the provision of technical services related to the operation of the website, always under the corresponding legal safeguards.
legal.privacy.section7.title: 7. User rights
legal.privacy.section7.p1: The user may exercise their rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction of processing, and portability, where applicable, by sending a request to [LEGAL EMAIL].
legal.privacy.section7.p2: The user may also withdraw consent at any time when the processing is based on consent, without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.
legal.privacy.section7.p3: If the user believes that their rights have not been properly addressed, they may file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency.
legal.privacy.section8.title: 8. Security
legal.privacy.section8.p1: Reasonable technical and organizational measures are adopted to protect personal data against loss, alteration, unauthorized access, or improper processing, taking into account the nature of the information and the associated risks.
legal.privacy.section9.title: 9. Changes to this policy
legal.privacy.section9.p1: This privacy policy may be updated at any time to adapt to legal, technical, or operational changes of the website. It is recommended to review it periodically.
legal.cookies.metaDescription: Cookie policy of NautiCards. Information about the use of cookies, their types, purpose, and user management options.
legal.cookies.subtitle: This page explains what cookies are, what types may be used on this website, and how users can manage them through their browser.
legal.cookies.section1.title: 1. What are cookies?
legal.cookies.section1.p1: Cookies are small text files stored on the user's device when visiting a website. They are used to remember browsing information, improve the user experience, or collect certain metrics, depending on the type of cookie.
legal.cookies.section2.title: 2. Types of cookies
legal.cookies.section2.p1: Cookies may be classified, among others, as follows:
legal.cookies.section2.li1: Technical cookies: necessary for the basic functioning of the website.
legal.cookies.section2.li2: Preference cookies: allow remembering user settings, such as language or region.
legal.cookies.section2.li3: Analytics cookies: used to collect usage statistics and improve the site.
legal.cookies.section2.li4: Advertising cookies: allow managing ads or personalizing campaigns.
legal.cookies.section3.title: 3. Cookies used on this site
legal.cookies.section3.p1: At the current stage of the project, this website may only use technical or preference cookies that are necessary for its basic operation, such as remembering the language selected by the user.
legal.cookies.section3.p2: If analytics tools, measurement tools, or third-party services involving the use of additional cookies are added in the future, this policy must be updated and, where appropriate, the corresponding consent mechanism must be displayed.
legal.cookies.section4.title: 4. Third-party cookies
legal.cookies.section4.p1: Certain services integrated into the website may, where applicable, install cookies managed by third parties. This will depend on the external tools that are ultimately used in the project.
legal.cookies.section4.p2: If such services are incorporated, this policy must clearly identify those third parties and the purpose of their cookies.
legal.cookies.section5.title: 5. How to disable or delete cookies
legal.cookies.section5.p1: Users may allow, block, or delete cookies installed on their device through the browser settings they use. The way to do this depends on the browser and the device.
legal.cookies.section5.p2: Please note that disabling certain technical cookies may affect the proper functioning of the website.
legal.cookies.section6.title: 6. Updates to this policy
legal.cookies.section6.p1: This cookie policy may be modified when the technical configuration of the site changes, new services are incorporated, or regulatory changes require it.
